page_content:
Repeatable to: 6 credits.

THET898 Pre-Candidacy Research (3-6 Credits)

Research and preparation for the Comprehensive Examinations and for the Qualifying Examinations. Students must register for at least one of these classes in each of the semesters in which these exams are taken and may register for two THET 898 courses in a semester if they are taught by different instructors. (Total credits per semester for all courses must not exceed 10 credits, 6 credits during the winter term.)
